headline: Wells Fargo new S&P 500 target sends investors clear signal
summary: Stocks are already up more than 10% this year. Most strategists would call that a good run and leave it alone. Wells Fargo looked at the same market and decided it wasn't done yet. The bank raised its year-end 2026 target for the S&P 500 to 7,950, up from 7,300, implying roughly 5.2% more ...

headline: Wells Fargo: Raking In A 6.4% Preferred Dividend Yield
summary: Wells Fargo preferred shares are attractive for income investors. Read how these preferreds fit into a dividend portfolio. See here for more details.
